reasoning: The arrow projectile is identifiable against the gray brick background — the bright yellow/gold arrowhead provides adequate contrast and the diagonal silhouette reads as a projectile. Spottable within ~0.5s due to warm color against neutral gray. However, the trail effect uses a noisy black-and-white checkerboard/dotted pattern that adds visual clutter inconsistent with the clean, uncluttered Echoes aesthetic. The trail partially mimics the pixel texture of the brick tiles, risking momentary confusion. No dark-area visibility issue in this scene. The arrowhead looks reasonably native in pixel-art style, but the trail composite feels slightly game-jam rather than polished. Core readability is functional but trail quality pulls the score down.
